description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 22, 2026 at 10:07 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Bowdoin Street near Felton Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was parked facing south at the west curb on Bowdoin Street in autonomous mode with its hazard lights activated in 
between two parked passenger cars. A driver from Waymo roadside assistance entered the Waymo AV and transitioned the Waymo AV to 
manual mode. The driver reversed, and the rear of the Waymo AV made contact with the front of a passenger car parked directly behind the 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a driver was operating the Waymo AV in 
manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
